Title:

Description:
Hey there,

~mission(Contractor|Reaction)

Found the perfect shipment contract for you to tackle. There's a shipment waiting at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to be taken to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Sounds good, right? ~mission(Contractor|Timed)~mission(Contractor|Danger)

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator

DisplayDescription:
Hey there,

Covalex Independent Contractors

Found the perfect shipment contract for you to tackle. There's a shipment waiting at <EM4>[Location|Address]</EM4> to be taken to <EM4>[Destination|Address]</EM4>. Sounds good, right? Covalex Independent Contractors[Contractor|Danger]

[Contractor|SignOff]

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. By accepting this contract, you are agreeing to all terms and conditions as outlined in our extended 'Independent Workers Supplemental Information Guide v.2948.01.29.' Covalex Shipping is not responsible for any damages that occur while operating as an independent contractor.

Contractor|Danger: One more thing, I'm seeing here that you'll be working in a heightened safety area. I'm sure you always follow best practices, but a little extra caution probably wouldn't be a bad idea. Better safe than sorry, right!

One last thing, it looks like some of our previous operators have reported outlaw activity in the area. Might be a good idea to plan for some extra security precautions. But if you do get into a situation (though you probably won't!), remember Covalex's policy of 'Flight, not fight.'

Also, unfortunately, it seems a security flag has been placed on this contract. Nothing to worry about too much... but that said, you should probably at least be extra careful during this job. Be ready for anything and you'll never be surprised!

One more little wrinkle. The system has flagged this contract as potentially hazardous. It might not mean anything, but don't be too surprised if you run into a bump or two or three while completing this one.

Last thing. This contract has been given a security flag. They add those when there is a higher risk involved. Sometimes it's hazardous routes, sometimes outlaw sightings, but you're going to want to be extra sharp on this one.
Contractor|SignOff: Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,
And as the poster on my wall says, 'Bee Safe, Honey!'
Can't wait to hear how everything goes,
I'm rooting for you. Make me proud!
Itinerary:
DELIVERY ITINERARY

PACKAGE PICK UP
     · Package #[item1|serialnumber] from Shipping Area

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver packages to Storehouse
